iterations.theme: Ivica Zubac: From Herzegovina Roots to NBA Stardom – A Comprehensive Look at His Journey, Challenges, and Aspirations
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast, as its total duration (36:52) falls within the specified range of 35-45 minutes for a single thematic block.
